Document Converter

Convert your documents

Upload a PDF, Word, PowerPoint or text file and convert it to the format you need. Fast, private, and free.

Drop files here or click to browse
PDF, DOCX, PPTX or TXT · up to 20 MB each · up to 20 files
Supported inputs: PDF, Word (DOCX), PowerPoint (PPTX) and plain text. Any file can be converted to PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Markdown or plain text. One output format applies to every file. For cross-format conversions (such as PDF → Word or PowerPoint), the text content is rebuilt into the new format — the original layout and images aren't preserved.
Find the right AI tool

★ Featured Tools
Hand-picked tools we recommend and partner with — try them at no extra cost.
✦ How to narrow your decision · a 4-step guide
1
Describe the task
Type what you want AI to do in plain English. The use-case search will surface matching tools instantly.
2
Filter by fit
Use the filter bar to narrow by industry, use case and pricing — only see tools that match your context.
3
Compare contenders
Open 2–3 finalists and use Compare to see features, pricing and reliability side-by-side.
4
Try & rate
Open the tool, try it on a real task, then rate it on the Okiru card so you remember which won.

Okiru is a South African AI consulting firm helping organisations navigate the future of work. We design AI strategies, build custom solutions, and train your team to work confidently with intelligent technology.

Choose your format
From a fast commercial uplift to a fully governed, sustained adoption programme.
Full-Day
Full-Day AI Training
A one-day, high-impact session that gets your team using AI productively and safely — from R6,500 per delegate.
  • Commercial AI use-cases for real work
  • Prompting that works: structures & quality checks
  • Safe tool setup with governance guardrails
  • Hands-on activities & role-specific workflows
  • Assessed deliverable + certificate
Programme
3-Month Programme
For teams that want sustained adoption, measured improvement and governed AI usage across every function.
  • Structured multi-week learning path
  • Okiru LMS access throughout
  • Measured improvement & adoption tracking
  • Governed usage across the business
  • Certificate on completion
2-Hour
Deep Dive Workshops
Focused 2-hour sessions on specific skills. Run standalone or stack them into a broader programme.
  • Safe AI Use & Compliance
  • Prompt Mastery & Creativity
  • Copilot Workflow Automation
  • Claude Customisation
  • AI-powered Reporting & Analysis
See all workshops

Documents & Reports

📊
Analysis
Work with spreadsheets, summarise long documents and prepare board-ready insights.
🗂️
Projects & Knowledge
Set up Projects with your company context so Claude understands your business every time.
🔄
AI in Daily Workflows
Identify which tasks move to AI, build repeatable templates, and measure the time saved.

NEW · BEGINNER FRIENDLY
Build the Perfect Prompt
Every Time
New to AI? You're in the right place. Tell us what you want, pick your AI assistant, and we'll write a clear, structured prompt for you using the proven PEFTC framework — Persona, Exemplar, Format, Task, Tone, Context.
Tap any step to jump there. Each one builds on the last.
The skill that changes everything

The 3 Levels of Prompting

What you type on the surface vs. what actually gets results. Most people stay at Level 1. This builder takes you all the way to Level 3 — where the best work happens.

1
Just typeOn the surface
Where most people stop
  • No setup — just type your question and hope for the best
  • Give it one sample: “write it like this”
  • Quick one-off jobs: fix, shorten, translate
  • Ask for a list, then pick the best one
2
Give the full pictureGoing deeper
Where real work happens
  • Give it a character — who it is, how it should sound
  • Be specific about the exact job & who reads it
  • Tell it how to reply — bullets, a table, paragraphs
  • Paste a finished example to match
  • Set hard rules — always do this, never do that
  • Wire in your tools & files
3
Where results liveGoing all in
Everything changes here
  • Pick the right model for the task
  • Tell it to think first, before it replies
  • Turn on Plan Mode — approve the plan, then it goes
  • Keep your context in one place (a reusable context file)
  • Turn repeat jobs into reusable Skills & Projects
  • Connect your tools so it reads & writes for you
  • Stack it all: role + context + examples + iteration
Most people live at Level 1. Everything changes at Level 3 — and the steps below take you there.
🤖
Step 2 · Choose Your AI Assistant Pick the AI tool you'll paste your prompt into. We'll open it for you in a new tab.
Why this matters: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and the rest each have a preferred prompt style. Selecting your AI here lets us assemble the prompt in the structure that AI responds to best — Claude gets the "DNA" structure, the others get clean PEFTC.

Preset Prompts New

Battle-tested prompt templates by role. Click a card — we'll load it into your goal field, switch your AI to Claude, and assemble the full structured prompt for you.

Step 1 · What do you want your AI to do?

Type your goal in plain English — like you're asking a smart colleague. Be specific about the result you need.

Why this matters: a clear goal is the difference between a mediocre AI reply and a usable one. We use what you type here as the seed for all six PEFTC tiles below — they fill in live as you type, so you can see your prompt take shape in real time.
↗ Open ChatGPT
Using: ChatGPT — the most widely used AI assistant
✶
The DNA of a Claude Prompt Claude is selected, so your final prompt will follow Claude's preferred structure: Goal → Context Files → Reference + Rules → Success Brief → Guardrails → Clarify → Plan → Approval. Just fill in the tiles and we'll assemble it for you.
Your prompt level Start typing…
✓ Clear goal
✓ Who the AI is
✓ Full context
✓ Output format
✓ A reference example
✓ Hard rules
✓ Level 3 booster
Type your goal above to see your prompt level — then we'll guide you up to Level 3.
✦
Level 3 boosters Tap to bake pro-level behaviour into your prompt. We add the instructions for you.
🎯
Which model to use
Pick your AI above
Tell us your goal and we'll recommend the exact model to choose for this task.
🧰
Best tool for this job
Describe your task
Some jobs need more than a chatbot. We'll point you to the right AI tool for what you're doing.

Persona Who the AI should be

Exemplar A strong example

Format Structure of output

Task What to do

Tone How it should sound

Context Key facts and constraints

Step 4 · Your Perfect Prompt Copy & paste into your AI

Why this is last: the final prompt below assembles everything you typed into the exact structure your chosen AI prefers. Copy it, paste it into the AI, and you're done.
Open ChatGPT
Tip: Click Auto-fill via AI to copy a meta-prompt that lets your AI fill the tiles for you.
✓Copied to clipboard

How to use this — in 5 simple steps

Brand new to AI? Follow these and you'll write better prompts than 90% of users on day one.

01
Pick your AI tool.
Choose ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Perplexity, or Meta AI — whichever you have access to.
02
Describe your goal in plain words.
Type what you want — like writing to a smart colleague. Be specific about the result you need.
03
Hit Generate prompt.
The advisor fills in all six tiles — Persona, Exemplar, Format, Task, Tone, Context — for you.
04
Tweak any tile.
Edit any tile to match your exact needs. The final prompt updates live as you type.
05
Copy and paste into your AI.
Click Copy final prompt, then Open AI, and paste. Done — instant pro-level results.

✶The Only Claude AI Cheat Sheet You'll Ever Need

A quick reference for getting the most out of Claude — models, the Context File, Memory, Skills, Connectors, Scheduled Tasks, prompting techniques, copy-paste prompts, and Claude vs ChatGPT. Tap any card to expand.
